title: Lemony Smoky Shaggy Almond Pasta
description: An energizing Indian dish featuring almond essence, lardons-rendered fat, and a smoky, shaggy texture for lacto-vegetarian dishes.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 C). Cook lentils in boiling water until tender.
Sauté onions and garlic in olive oil until translucent. Add almond flour, mix well, and cook for another minute.
Mix lentils with the almond-flour mixture and set aside. Toast lardons in a pan over medium heat.
Combine toasted lardons with smoky paprika, lemon zest, and salt/pepper. Mix evenly with the lentil-almond mix.
Boil pasta until al dente. Drain and mix with the lentil-lardon mixture.
Fold in balsamic vinegar for a bright finish. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.
